name: commit-rules
description: Personal commit policy for coherent commit scope, Conventional Commits, and pre-commit verification.

interface.shortDescription: Personal Git commit rules for scope, message format, and verification.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight personal workflow overlay for Codex commit creation. It keeps commits limited to one coherent change, requires Conventional Commit messages, and blocks commits when relevant lint, build, test, or type-check verification has not passed. It intentionally does not own push, pull request creation, branch cleanup, release workflow, or CI debugging.
defaultPrompt: Split my changes into clean commits.
Check whether this is ready to commit.
